reviews.comment:
Recomiendo este lugar: tiene para cargar combustible, comer allí, comer en las mesas al aire libre tranquilos, un mercadillo y unos lindos perros. Buena para parar en viajes largos, en mi ocasión lleno a Cumbrecita.

(Translated by Google)
I recommend this place: it has gas, food, quiet outdoor tables, a small market, and cute dogs. It's a good place to stop on long trips; I filled up there on my way to Cumbrecita.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURPZ2VXODd3RRAB

reviews.comment:

A very nice and comfortable place to rest along the way. The service is excellent, and the prosciutto sandwiches are delicious! I highly recommend it.

Siempre que viajamos a Córdoba, tanto de ida como de vuelta, es nuestra parada obligada para degustar los exquisitos sándwiches de este lugar además cargar combustible.
No te lo podes perder. Vale.
Manuel

Don't miss it. Okay.
